zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Fisher於大約1495年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可文費爾德時，他的父親John Fisher32歲，母親Christina Marvin28歲。他於1515年與Elizabeth Hunt在英國素福爾可希勒哈姆結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1562年7月在英國英格蘭素福爾可希勒哈姆享年68歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可希勒哈姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Fisher于大约1495年出生在英国英格兰素福爾可文費爾德时，他的父亲John Fisher32岁，母亲Christina Marvin28岁。他于1515年与Elizabeth Hunt在英国素福爾可希勒哈姆结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1562年7月在英国英格兰素福爾可希勒哈姆享年68岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素福爾可希勒哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: Fisher
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a fisherman, from Middle English fis(sc)her(e) ‘fisherman’ (Old English fiscere). In North America, this surname has absorbed cognates from many other languages, including German Fischer and its Slavic(ized) variant Fišer (see Fiser ), Dutch Visser , Hungarian Halász (see Halasz ), Italian Pescatore , Slovenian Ribič (see Ribic ), and Croatian Ribić or Ribar .

English: in a few cases, possibly a topographic name for someone who lived near a fish weir on a river, from Middle English fis(sc)hwere, fisshyar ‘fish weir’ (Old English fiscwer, fiscgear), or a habitational name from a place so named, such as Fisher in North Mundham, Sussex.
Irish: translation into English of Gaelic Ó Bradáin ‘descendant of Bradán’, a personal name meaning ‘salmon’. See Braden .

variants.name: Fischer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Hans, Otto, Erwin, Gerhard, Helmut, Fritz, Klaus, Horst, Dieter, Franz, Ernst.

German, Danish, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): occupational name for a fisherman, from Middle High German visch, German Fisch ‘fish’ + the agent suffix -er. This form of the surname is also established in some other parts of Europe, notably in France (Alsace and Lorraine), Hungary, and the Netherlands. In Poland, Czechia, Croatia, and Slovenia it is (also) established in the Slavicized forms Fiszer (Polish) and Fišer (see Fiser ). Compare Fisher .

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Fisher was born about 1495, in Wingfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Fisher, was 32 and his mother, Christina Marvin, was 28. He married Elizabeth Hunt in 1515, in Syleham, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in July 1562, in Syleham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 68, and was buried in Syleham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Fisher est né environ 1495, à Wingfield, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Fisher, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Christina Marvin, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Hunt en 1515, à Syleham, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en juillet 1562, à Syleham, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 68 ans, et a été enterré à Syleham, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Fisher um 1495 in Wingfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Fisher 32 und seine Mutter Christina Marvin 28. Er hat 1515 in Syleham, Suffolk, England Elizabeth Hunt geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb im Juli 1562 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Syleham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Syleham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Fisher è nato il circa 1495 nel Wingfield, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John Fisher, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Christina Marvin, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Hunt nel 1515, nel Syleham, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel luglio 1562, nel Syleham, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 68 anni, e fu sepolto a Syleham, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Fisherが約1495年にイギリスイギリススフォルクウィングフィールドで生まれた時，父John Fisherは32歳，母Christina Marvinは28歳であった。1515年にイギリススフォルクシレハムでElizabeth Huntと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1562年7月にイギリスイギリススフォルクシレハムで68歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススフォルクシレハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Fisher(이)가 대략 1495년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 윙필드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Fisher(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Christina Marvin(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1515년 영국 수폴크 실함에서 Elizabeth Hunt(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1562년 7월 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 실함에서 68세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 실함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Fisher nasceu aproximadamente 1495, em Wingfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Fisher, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Christina Marvin, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Hunt em 1515, em Syleham, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em julho de 1562, em Syleham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 68 anos, e foi sepultado em Syleham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Fisher родился около 1495 г. в местности вингфиелд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Fisher было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Christina Marvin, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Hunt в 1515 г. в местности силэам, суффолк, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер июль 1562 г. в местности силэам, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 68 лет и был похоронен в местности силэам, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.
